lessons.title: Auto Memory: Taming the 200-Line MEMORY.md Limit
lessons.summary: How to structure Claude Code's auto memory system using topic files and the capture-promote-prune cycle to stay under the 200-line MEMORY.md limit.

lessons.title: The Three-Level CLAUDE.md Hierarchy
lessons.summary: How CLAUDE.md operates at Global, Project, and Directory levels — and why the most specific level always wins.

lessons.title: Hooks: Auto-Run Scripts Before and After Every Tool Call
lessons.summary: How to configure preTool and postTool hooks in settings.json to auto-format code, enforce policies, and audit tool usage.

lessons.title: Tame Context Bloat with /compact Focus Hints
lessons.summary: How to use /compact with focus hints at natural breakpoints to preserve critical context before auto-compression decides for you.

lessons.title: Worktrees: Run Parallel Claude Sessions Without Conflicts
lessons.summary: How to use the --worktree flag to run multiple Claude Code sessions on the same repo in isolated checkouts, enabling parallel work without file conflicts.

lessons.title: Custom Slash Commands: Build Reusable Prompt Templates
lessons.summary: How to create custom slash commands as markdown files in .claude/commands/, use $ARGUMENTS for flexible templates, and share them with your team via git.

lessons.title: Code Review: Multi-Agent PR Analysis That Catches What Humans Miss
lessons.summary: How Claude Code Review dispatches parallel specialized agents to find logic errors, security issues, and regressions in your PRs with under 1% false positive rate.
